exports.name: listWorkbooks
exports.sql:
select
    id,
    name,
    created_at,
    updated_at,
    created_by,
    sort_order
from datasette_sheets_workbook
order by sort_order, created_at;

exports.name: getWorkbook
exports.sql:
select
    id,
    name,
    created_at,
    updated_at,
    created_by,
    sort_order
from datasette_sheets_workbook
where id = $workbook_id::integer;

exports.name: insertWorkbook
updateWorkbook
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_workbook
set name = case when $name_do_update::boolean then $name::text else name end,
    sort_order = case
        when $sort_order_do_update::boolean then $sort_order::integer
        else sort_order
    end,
    updated_at = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%f', 'now')
where id = $workbook_id::integer
returning id, name, created_at, updated_at, created_by, sort_order;

exports.name: deleteWorkbookCells
deleteWorkbookColumns
deleteWorkbookNamedRanges
deleteWorkbookSheets
exports.sql: delete from datasette_sheets_sheet where workbook_id = $workbook_id::integer;

exports.name: deleteWorkbookRow
exports.sql: delete from datasette_sheets_workbook where id = $workbook_id::integer;

exports.name: listSheets
exports.sql:
select id, workbook_id, name, color, sort_order, created_at, updated_at
from datasette_sheets_sheet
where workbook_id = $workbook_id::integer
order by sort_order, created_at;

exports.name: getSheet
insertSheet
updateSheet
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_sheet
set name = case when $name_do_update::boolean then $name::text else name end,
    color = case when $color_do_update::boolean then $color::text else color end,
    sort_order = case
        when $sort_order_do_update::boolean then $sort_order::integer
        else sort_order
    end,
    updated_at = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%f', 'now')
where id = $sheet_id::integer
returning id, workbook_id, name, color, sort_order, created_at, updated_at;

exports.name: insertDefaultColumn
exports.sql:
insert into datasette_sheets_column (sheet_id, col_idx, name, width)
values ($sheet_id::integer, $col_idx::integer, $name::text, $width::integer);

exports.name: deleteSheetCells
exports.sql: delete from datasette_sheets_cell where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer;

exports.name: deleteSheetColumns
exports.sql: delete from datasette_sheets_column where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer;

exports.name: deleteSheetNamedRanges
exports.sql: delete from datasette_sheets_named_range where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer;

exports.name: deleteSheetRow
exports.sql: delete from datasette_sheets_sheet where id = $sheet_id::integer;

exports.name: reorderSheet
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_sheet
set sort_order = $sort_order::integer,
    updated_at = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%f', 'now')
where id = $sheet_id::integer
  and workbook_id = $workbook_id::integer;

exports.name: touchSheet
listColumns
exports.sql:
select sheet_id, col_idx, name, width, format_json
from datasette_sheets_column
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
order by col_idx;

exports.name: setColumn
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_column
set name = case when $name_do_update::boolean then $name::text else name end,
    width = case
        when $width_do_update::boolean then $width::integer
        else width
    end
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
  and col_idx = $col_idx::integer
returning sheet_id, col_idx, name, width, format_json;

exports.name: listCells
exports.sql:
select sheet_id, row_idx, col_idx, raw_value, computed_value,
       computed_value_kind, typed_kind, typed_data, format_json,
       updated_at, updated_by
from datasette_sheets_cell
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
order by row_idx, col_idx;

exports.name: deleteCell
exports.sql:
delete from datasette_sheets_cell
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
  and row_idx = $row_idx::integer
  and col_idx = $col_idx::integer;

exports.name: upsertCell
exports.sql:
insert into datasette_sheets_cell
    (sheet_id, row_idx, col_idx, raw_value, format_json,
     typed_kind, typed_data, updated_by, updated_at)
values
    ($sheet_id::integer, $row_idx::integer, $col_idx::integer,
     $raw_value::text, $format_json::text::,
     $typed_kind::text::, $typed_data::text::,
     $updated_by::text::, strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%f', 'now'))
on conflict(sheet_id, row_idx, col_idx) do update set
    raw_value = excluded.raw_value,
    format_json = excluded.format_json,
    typed_kind = excluded.typed_kind,
    typed_data = excluded.typed_data,
    updated_by = excluded.updated_by,
    updated_at = excluded.updated_at;

exports.name: listCellsForRecalc
exports.sql:
select row_idx, col_idx, raw_value, typed_kind, typed_data,
       computed_value, computed_value_kind
from datasette_sheets_cell
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer;

exports.name: listNamedRangesForRecalc
updateCellComputed
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_cell
set computed_value = $value::,
    computed_value_kind = $kind::text::
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
  and row_idx = $row_idx::integer
  and col_idx = $col_idx::integer;

exports.name: listFormulaCells
exports.sql:
select row_idx, col_idx, raw_value
from datasette_sheets_cell
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
  and raw_value like '=%';

exports.name: updateCellRaw
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_cell
set raw_value = $raw_value::text
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
  and row_idx = $row_idx::integer
  and col_idx = $col_idx::integer;

exports.name: deleteCellsInRows
shiftCellRowsToBuffer
shiftCellRowsFromBuffer
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_cell
set row_idx = (-row_idx - 1) - (
    select count(*) from json_each($row_indices_json::text)
    where cast(value as integer) < (-datasette_sheets_cell.row_idx - 1)
)
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
  and row_idx < 0;

exports.name: deleteCellsInCols
deleteColumnsInCols
shiftCellColsToBuffer
shiftCellColsFromBuffer
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_cell
set col_idx = (-col_idx - 1) - (
    select count(*) from json_each($col_indices_json::text)
    where cast(value as integer) < (-datasette_sheets_cell.col_idx - 1)
)
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
  and col_idx < 0;

exports.name: shiftColumnColsToBuffer
shiftColumnColsFromBuffer
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_column
set col_idx = (-col_idx - 1) - (
    select count(*) from json_each($col_indices_json::text)
    where cast(value as integer) < (-datasette_sheets_column.col_idx - 1)
)
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
  and col_idx < 0;

exports.name: insertShiftCellColsToBuffer
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_cell
set col_idx = -(col_idx + 1)
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
  and col_idx >= $at::integer;

exports.name: insertShiftCellColsFromBuffer
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_cell
set col_idx = (-col_idx - 1) + $count::integer
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
  and col_idx < 0;

exports.name: insertShiftColumnColsToBuffer
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_column
set col_idx = -(col_idx + 1)
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
  and col_idx >= $at::integer;

exports.name: insertShiftColumnColsFromBuffer
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_column
set col_idx = (-col_idx - 1) + $count::integer
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
  and col_idx < 0;

exports.name: moveCellColsToBuffer
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_cell
set col_idx = -(col_idx + 1)
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
  and col_idx between $low::integer and $high::integer;

exports.name: moveCellColsFromBuffer
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_cell
set col_idx = case
  when (-col_idx - 1) between $src_start::integer and $src_end::integer
    then (-col_idx - 1) - $src_start::integer + $final_start::integer
  when (-col_idx - 1) < $src_start::integer
    then (-col_idx - 1) + $width::integer
  else (-col_idx - 1) - $width::integer
end
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
  and col_idx < 0;

exports.name: moveColumnMetaToBuffer
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_column
set col_idx = -(col_idx + 1)
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
  and col_idx between $low::integer and $high::integer;

exports.name: moveColumnMetaFromBuffer
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_column
set col_idx = case
  when (-col_idx - 1) between $src_start::integer and $src_end::integer
    then (-col_idx - 1) - $src_start::integer + $final_start::integer
  when (-col_idx - 1) < $src_start::integer
    then (-col_idx - 1) + $width::integer
  else (-col_idx - 1) - $width::integer
end
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
  and col_idx < 0;

exports.name: moveCellRowsToBuffer
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_cell
set row_idx = -(row_idx + 1)
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
  and row_idx between $low::integer and $high::integer;

exports.name: moveCellRowsFromBuffer
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_cell
set row_idx = case
  when (-row_idx - 1) between $src_start::integer and $src_end::integer
    then (-row_idx - 1) - $src_start::integer + $final_start::integer
  when (-row_idx - 1) < $src_start::integer
    then (-row_idx - 1) + $width::integer
  else (-row_idx - 1) - $width::integer
end
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
  and row_idx < 0;

exports.name: listNamedRanges
exports.sql:
select sheet_id, name, definition, updated_at
from datasette_sheets_named_range
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
order by name collate nocase;

exports.name: upsertNamedRange
exports.sql:
insert into datasette_sheets_named_range
    (sheet_id, name, definition, updated_at)
values
    ($sheet_id::integer, $name::text, $definition::text,
     strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%f', 'now'))
on conflict(sheet_id, name) do update set
    definition = excluded.definition,
    updated_at = excluded.updated_at
returning sheet_id, name, definition, updated_at;

exports.name: deleteNamedRange
exports.sql:
delete from datasette_sheets_named_range
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
  and name = $name::text collate nocase
returning name;

exports.name: updateNamedRangeDefinition
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_named_range
set definition = $definition::text,
    updated_at = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%f', 'now')
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
  and name = $name::text collate nocase;

exports.name: listDropdownRules
exports.sql:
select id, workbook_id, name, multi, options_json, updated_at
from datasette_sheets_dropdown_rule
where workbook_id = $workbook_id::integer
order by coalesce(name, ''), id;

exports.name: getDropdownRule
exports.sql:
select id, workbook_id, name, multi, options_json, updated_at
from datasette_sheets_dropdown_rule
where id = $rule_id::integer
  and workbook_id = $workbook_id::integer;

exports.name: insertDropdownRule
exports.sql:
insert into datasette_sheets_dropdown_rule
    (workbook_id, name, multi, options_json, updated_at)
values
    ($workbook_id::integer, $name::text::,
     $multi::integer, $options_json::text,
     strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%f', 'now'))
returning id, workbook_id, name, multi, options_json, updated_at;

exports.name: updateDropdownRule
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_dropdown_rule
set name = case
        when $name_do_update::boolean then $name::text::
        else name
    end,
    multi = case
        when $multi_do_update::boolean then $multi::integer
        else multi
    end,
    options_json = case
        when $options_do_update::boolean then $options_json::text
        else options_json
    end,
    updated_at = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%f', 'now')
where id = $rule_id::integer
  and workbook_id = $workbook_id::integer
returning id, workbook_id, name, multi, options_json, updated_at;

exports.name: deleteDropdownRule
exports.sql:
delete from datasette_sheets_dropdown_rule
where id = $rule_id::integer
  and workbook_id = $workbook_id::integer
returning id;

exports.name: deleteWorkbookDropdownRules
exports.sql:
delete from datasette_sheets_dropdown_rule
where workbook_id = $workbook_id::integer;

exports.name: listViews
exports.sql:
select id, sheet_id, view_name, range_str, min_row, min_col, max_row, max_col,
       use_headers, color, created_at, enable_insert, enable_update,
       enable_delete, delete_mode
from datasette_sheets_view
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
order by created_at;

exports.name: getView
exports.sql:
select id, sheet_id, view_name, range_str, min_row, min_col, max_row, max_col,
       use_headers, color, created_at, enable_insert, enable_update,
       enable_delete, delete_mode
from datasette_sheets_view
where id = $view_id::integer;

exports.name: insertView
exports.sql:
insert into datasette_sheets_view
    (sheet_id, view_name, range_str, min_row, min_col, max_row, max_col,
     use_headers, color, enable_insert, enable_update, enable_delete, delete_mode)
values
    ($sheet_id::integer, $view_name::text, $range_str::text,
     $min_row::integer, $min_col::integer, $max_row::integer, $max_col::integer,
     $use_headers::integer, $color::text,
     $enable_insert::integer, $enable_update::integer, $enable_delete::integer,
     $delete_mode::text)
returning id, sheet_id, view_name, range_str, min_row, min_col, max_row, max_col,
          use_headers, color, created_at, enable_insert, enable_update,
          enable_delete, delete_mode;

exports.name: deleteView
exports.sql: delete from datasette_sheets_view where id = $view_id::integer;

exports.name: updateViewColBounds
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_view
set min_col = $min_col::integer,
    max_col = $max_col::integer
where id = $view_id::integer;

exports.name: updateViewRowBounds
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_view
set min_row = $min_row::integer,
    max_row = $max_row::integer
where id = $view_id::integer;

exports.name: checkNameExists
exports.sql:
select name from sqlite_master
where type in ('table', 'view') and name = $name::text;

exports.name: listCellsInRow
exports.sql:
select col_idx, computed_value
from datasette_sheets_cell
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
  and row_idx = $row_idx::integer
  and col_idx between $min_col::integer and $max_col::integer;

exports.name: getFilterBySheet
exports.sql:
select id, sheet_id, min_row, min_col, max_row, max_col,
       sort_col_idx, sort_direction, predicates_json,
       created_at, updated_at
from datasette_sheets_filter
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer;

exports.name: insertFilter
exports.sql:
insert into datasette_sheets_filter
    (sheet_id, min_row, min_col, max_row, max_col,
     sort_col_idx, sort_direction, predicates_json)
values
    ($sheet_id::integer,
     $min_row::integer, $min_col::integer,
     $max_row::integer, $max_col::integer,
     $sort_col_idx::, $sort_direction::,
     $predicates_json::text)
returning id, sheet_id, min_row, min_col, max_row, max_col,
          sort_col_idx, sort_direction, predicates_json,
          created_at, updated_at;

exports.name: updateFilterColBounds
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_filter
set min_col = $min_col::integer,
    max_col = $max_col::integer,
    updated_at = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%f', 'now')
where id = $filter_id::integer;

exports.name: updateFilterRowBounds
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_filter
set min_row = $min_row::integer,
    max_row = $max_row::integer,
    updated_at = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%f', 'now')
where id = $filter_id::integer;

exports.name: updateFilterSort
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_filter
set sort_col_idx = $sort_col_idx::,
    sort_direction = $sort_direction::,
    updated_at = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%f', 'now')
where id = $filter_id::integer;

exports.name: updateFilterPredicates
exports.sql:
update datasette_sheets_filter
set predicates_json = $predicates_json::text,
    updated_at = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%f', 'now')
where id = $filter_id::integer;

exports.name: deleteFilterBySheet
exports.sql: delete from datasette_sheets_filter where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer;

exports.name: deleteWorkbookFilters
listCellsInColRange
exports.sql:
select row_idx, computed_value, computed_value_kind
from datasette_sheets_cell
where sheet_id = $sheet_id::integer
  and col_idx = $col_idx::integer
  and row_idx between $min_row::integer and $max_row::integer
order by row_idx;
